metaTitle: Elbow Pain Support & Bracing | Avana Surgical Systems
metaDescription: Tennis elbow, golfer's elbow, and post-surgical elbow support. Premium bracing solutions fitted across India.

hero.title: Strong, pain-free arms — without giving up what you love.
hero.description: Whether it's tennis elbow that's lasted months or recovery from a recent injury, the right brace eases pain and protects healing tissue.

conditions.title: Tennis Elbow
conditions.description: Lateral epicondylitis — pain on the outside of the elbow from repetitive strain.

conditions.title: Golfer's Elbow
conditions.description: Medial epicondylitis — pain on the inside of the elbow, often from gripping or lifting.

conditions.title: Post-Surgical Recovery
conditions.description: Controlled motion and protection during rehabilitation after elbow surgery.

conditions.title: Overuse Strain
conditions.description: Repetitive-strain injuries from sports, manual work, or computer use.

products.title: Tennis Elbow Strap
products.description: Targeted compression strap that relieves pain from lateral epicondylitis by redistributing force away from the inflamed tendon.

seoContent.title: Understanding elbow pain
seoContent.intro: Elbow pain — especially tennis and golfer's elbow — can persist for months without the right approach.

sections.heading: Why does my elbow hurt?
sections.body: Most elbow pain is from overuse — repetitive gripping, lifting, or wrist movement that strains the tendons attaching to the elbow.

sections.heading: How does bracing help?
sections.body: Counterforce straps redirect strain away from the inflamed area, allowing the tendon to heal while you continue daily activities.

seoContent.disclaimer: This page is educational. Please consult an orthopaedic specialist for persistent elbow pain.

faq.question: How long does tennis elbow take to heal?
faq.answer: Most cases resolve in 6–12 months with rest, bracing, and physiotherapy. Persistent cases may benefit from injection therapy or, rarely, surgery.

faq.question: Can I keep playing sport with a tennis elbow strap?
faq.answer: In many cases yes — but only if pain is mild and the strap allows you to play without compensating with poor technique. Discuss with your physiotherapist.

cta.title: Get back to grip strength — pain-free.
cta.description: Speak with our team for an honest recommendation on whether bracing fits your situation.
cta.disclaimer: All products dispatched by Osteokart.com — Avana's authorised retail partner.
